free_text: Energetics and mass distribution of fission fragments
in triton- and proton- accompanied fission of 252Cf
surface-barrier detectors of 20 mm diam, placed
opposite each other at 45 degree to the plane source.
Two particle telescopes were placed opposite each
other at both sides of 252Cf source at 90 degree to
Each particle-telescope system consisted of a
100-u dE/dx detector and 1500-u solid state counter.
The angle subtended by each telescope with respect to
Alpha particle, proton, triton and fission
Kinetic energy distribution is in  arbitrary
Mass distribution is in arbitrary units.
No information on source of uncertainties.
